No Poverty.reason: The course focuses on economic analysis of the sports industry, with no explicit mention or direct connection to poverty eradication or related targets.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course theme 'Mass-participation sport' directly promotes physical activity, which contributes to preventing non-communicable diseases and overall well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops relevant data and economic analysis skills for employment in the sports industry (Target 4.4).

Life Below Water.reason: There is no evidence in the course content that relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.
